{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322065021F1790F9C3CE4D4CFB055"}"},"total":12},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7605852909714408217","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有系统还要找寝室的人一起创业，可能我比较自私吧看不来这种，虽然不是我的菜，但还是给个5星支持一下吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770878756,"group_id":"7601429387916872729","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1NOsMqvA7NmCBQTJAY3BL8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/d509d652edd44e9f97267feaa8e80c0e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701605&x-signature=m15lRSNqxttW96xlqTBki5Z%2BbRs%3D","user_id":"109706954240","user_name":"布罗利"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109706954240","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601429387916872729","book_info":{"abstract":"【硬核科技+系统流+创业逆袭+爽文节奏】
国防科大大三学生李彬，在一个普通的夜晚激活了"科技提取系统"。
从《流浪地球》中提取的智能导航算法，让他拥有了领先时代二十年的技术！
别人的无人机还在依靠传感器被动避障？
他的SAPFR算法已经能预测障碍物轨迹，提前规划最优路径！
别人还在为天疆杯发愁？
他带着红蓝编织袋装的逐光一号，0.01秒绝杀全场，夺得全国冠军！
别人还在投简历找工作？
他已经拿到千万投资，军方主动找上门！
当逐光科技的蜂鸟无人机铺满城市天空——
当他的算法成为物流帝国的核心引擎——
当全世界都在使用他的技术——
李彬回首过往，轻声说道：
"我只是想做点有意思的事，没想到一不小心……造了个新时代。"","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6dba3f6f24f413ed59bc288ac5c77c1b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"李树人爱喝汤","author_id":"","book_id":"7601429387916872729","book_name":"我靠系统，造出了一个新时代","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#404850","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601429442442838553","read_count":"10523","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"395922"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"149","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/284a8cbce54c40220e2702a64cd0dca9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317421&x-signature=hmMEUxHLhPWBIxIF%2FU3ZbwNxnr8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"902048191878910","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"31"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322065021F1790F9C3CE4D4CFB055"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5566,"reply_count":15,"show_pv":2136},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":0,"author_reply_time":1770888594,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":f
